description: Field-level hallucination analysis for design phase reference

high_confidence_fields.description: Fields that extracted reliably across clean and degraded variants
high_confidence_fields.design_implication: Auto-accept these fields; minimal UX friction

medium_confidence_fields.description: Fields that extracted correctly on clean but degraded on degraded variants
medium_confidence_fields.design_implication: Show to user with medium-confidence indicator

low_confidence_fields.description: Fields prone to hallucination or format issues
low_confidence_fields.design_implication: Always show to user; require explicit confirmation

dates.issue: Model prefers 'Month Day, Year' over ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD'
dates.mitigation: Post-process both extracted and ground truth to common format

categories.issue: Model expands terse categories into full sentences
categories.mitigation: Map to canonical values via string similarity

confidence_heuristics.description: Rules of thumb for confidence scoring without model changes

heuristics.name: length_check
heuristics.rule: If extracted value length differs significantly from typical, flag for review

heuristics.name: date_plausibility
heuristics.rule: If date is in the future or >5 years in past, flag for review

heuristics.name: multi_pass_agreement
heuristics.rule: Run extraction twice; flag fields that differ between runs

heuristics.name: format_consistency
heuristics.rule: Flag if phone/date format doesn't match document locale patterns
